microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end deployment** of Azure's resilience validation platform, scaling from a 2-person operation to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ enterprise impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Built an **internal AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly expanding team throughput without headcount growth.

Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud **network isolation deployment** tied to a $1.5B+ contract, directing 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility across complex security and compliance constraints.
microsoft_2023: Drove **production adoption** of AI-powered code generation tooling across 14 Azure service teams, leading hands-on demos and integration sessions that saved 37 engineering hours monthly.

Improved retrieval performance by **83%** by migrating documentation infrastructure to an AI-powered semantic search system, enforcing metadata standards across distributed data pipelines.

Conducted discovery across 20+ enterprise service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a prioritized roadmap to automate critical deployment paths.
Engineered a **Power BI observability dashboard** tracking automation gaps across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target high-impact infrastructure investments with data-backed precision.

Implemented **automated CI/CD pipelines** in collaboration with IT, Operations, and Engineering, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% across a large-scale robotics fleet.
Stabilized developer intake by facilitating Agile ceremonies and resolving **40+ high-priority tickets**, unblocking critical integration work across cross-functional teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end CRM workflow, owning scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals and eliminating process bottlenecks in the customer engagement lifecycle.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and search profiles to improve inbound pipeline quality.
Identified and closed margin leaks by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, delivering pricing model recommendations that improved unit economics for leadership.
